function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-11-04
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-11-04                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

next_step.current_state: Invoice migration write succeeded. Reactive outbox verification is not applicable to this non-outbox finance record write. Next step is inbox cleanup per workflow.
next_step.observation: Write to /50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md completed without error.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed lowest inbox item, migrated invoice to schema frontmatter with body preserved, and removed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_next-task.md after successful completion of requested work.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by OCR-structuring the requested invoice note. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to /50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md using visible data from the note, preserved the full original body below frontmatter, kept changes focused, and then deleted the processed inbox item /00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS before entering folders, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, preserved original note body exactly under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked for OCR/frontmatter extraction on the specified invoice. The target invoice file contained all required invoice schema fields and line-item data, enabling exact extraction without guessing. The file was updated with required fields and lines per finance schema, body preserved verbatim, and inbox cleanup completed as required by inbox workflows.
